title: The Curse of the Dragon Sword
original_title: The Curse of the Dragon Sword
overview: Alex Cox presents, a Kung Fu adventure following a father and daughter duo as they seek to reforge the mythic Dragon Sword in order to exact revenge on a powerful warrior.
